Today you give your opinion and respond to others.

In my opinion, the plan is too fast.

So, in my opinion, we should launch in March. What is your point of view, Aline?
I agree with an early launch. Exactly -- March is good for the marketing team.
Great. And the budget is ready now, so we can move fast.
Actually, I disagree there. I see your point, but I prefer to wait two weeks on the budget.
That is a fair point. It depends on the final numbers. Let us check them first.
I suggest we launch in March and finalize the budget next week. I think that works for everyone.
In my opinion, we should wait.
That is a fair point.
I suggest a small change. It depends on the numbers.

Hi Aline, this is Tom. Before our meeting, I want to share my opinion about the new project plan. In my opinion, we should launch the campaign in March, not in April. I think March gives us more time before the summer. I know some people disagree, and that is a fair point. They prefer April because the budget is ready then. But personally, I believe an earlier launch is better for the team. I would love to hear your point of view in the meeting. If you agree with me, great. If you disagree, that is fine too. We can find a solution together. Talk soon.

This is a quick voice note before the team meeting. I need to share my opinion clearly and politely. First, I agree with Tom that an early launch is a good idea. In my opinion, March works well for the marketing team. However, I disagree about the budget. I think we should wait two weeks to be sure. I want to suggest a small change, not a big one. I will say, I see your point, but I prefer a safer plan. I know it depends on the final numbers. My goal is to give my point of view, listen to the others, and find a fair solution that works for everyone.

First, Tom shares his opinion that the campaign should launch in March. Then Aline agrees that an early launch is a good idea. After that, she disagrees about the budget and explains why. Next, she suggests waiting two weeks to be sure. Finally, the team finds a fair solution that works for everyone.
